title: Launch of 'BLUE ACTION NET-ZERO ALLIANCE,' Group-wide Carbon Inset Program for Ocean Transport
content: Mitsui O.S.K. Lines (MOL) launched the BLUE ACTION NET-ZERO ALLIANCE to reduce Scope 3 GHG emissions in ocean transport. The program enhances low-emission marine transportation using alternative fuels. It fosters collaboration with stakeholders to drive sustainable shipping solutions.
author: Analysts Account
